seo.title: Online Image Cropper | Creative Lab
seo.description: Crop JPG, PNG, WebP and SVG images for free in your browser with Creative Lab. Choose an aspect ratio, adjust the area and download the result.
seo.ogDescription: Crop images directly in your browser with custom aspect ratios.
seo.twitterDescription: Crop JPG, PNG, WebP and SVG images in your browser.

product.title: Image Cropper
product.description: Select the exact area you want to keep, use preset aspect ratios and download the crop from your browser.

cropper.title: Select an image
cropper.intro: Upload an image, choose an aspect ratio and adjust the crop area.
cropper.uploadTitle: Drag an image here or click to select it
cropper.uploadHelp: JPG, PNG, WebP or SVG. Maximum 25 MB.

messages.invalidFormat: Select a JPG, PNG, WebP or SVG image.
messages.fileTooLarge: The image exceeds the 25 MB limit.
messages.readError: The image could not be read.
messages.outsideImage: The crop area must overlap the image.
messages.canvasError: The browser could not start the cropper.
messages.cropError: The image could not be cropped.

info.title: How to crop images with Creative Lab
info.description: Select an image, adjust the visible area and download the crop in your preferred format.
info.stepOneText: Select a JPG, PNG, WebP or SVG image.
info.stepTwoText: Move and resize the crop area or use an aspect ratio.
info.stepThreeText: Preview and save the cropped image.
